title: Tinyproxy Configuration
description: Schema for Tinyproxy HTTP proxy daemon configuration parameters

user.description: System user to run the proxy daemon as

group.description: System group for the proxy daemon process

minSpareServers.description: Minimum number of spare server processes

maxSpareServers.description: Maximum number of spare server processes

startServers.description: Initial number of server processes to start

maxRequestsPerChild.description: Number of connections per child process before recycling

allow.description: Allowed client IP addresses or CIDR ranges

deny.description: Denied client IP addresses or CIDR ranges

disableViaHeader.description: Whether to disable the Via header

xTinyproxyHeader.description: Whether to send X-Tinyproxy header with client IP

filter.description: Path to filter file for URL/domain filtering

filterURLs.description: Whether to filter by full URLs rather than just domains

filterDefaultDeny.description: Default deny policy when filter file is active

reverseOnly.description: Whether to operate in reverse proxy mode only

reverseMagic.description: Whether to add cookie magic for reverse proxying

reverseBaseURL.description: Base URL for reverse proxy mode

statFile.description: Path to statistics page template file

bindSameAddress.description: Whether to bind outbound connections to same address
